summary: High-quality PowerShell/YAML code, but critical files missing. Workflow step 'Verify project files exist' requires rules.json and changed-files.txt—not provided. Run-ActTests.ps1 copies non-existent files (rules.json, .actrc, fixtures/*.txt, LabelAssigner.Tests.ps1) and will crash immediately. Workflow references Invoke-Pester but test file not shown. Module/script code itself is well-structured (Set-StrictMode, error handling, -LiteralPath usage all correct), but deliverable won't execute as-is.
